title: Low and Short
description: Makes some of the textures shorter and models lower
body:
This texture pack changes how some items and blocks look! It makes them shorter, with makes you have a better view. 

Here is a list of blocks and items that will be changed when the texture pack is enabled.

- short tools (including the mace)
- fire and soul fire
- the view when the player is on fire
- lower shield
- lower grass and other plants

Credits to Oculie for Low Sield.

hope you enjoy the pack!
